title: Interactive Charts, Diagrams and Visualizations
description: Claude can now create custom charts, diagrams and other visualizations in-line in its responses. These interactive visuals appear directly in chat conversations to help users understand concepts and analyze data, and can be tweaked as the conversation develops.

community_feedback.quote: 700+ votes with 51 comments on Reddit discussing Claude's new interactive visual capabilities
Users excited about the ability to visualize concepts interactively with clickable elements

title: Major Agentic Capabilities Improvements in JetBrains IDEs
description: Core agentic capabilities including custom agents, sub-agents, and plan agent are now generally available. Agent hooks support in public preview, auto-approve support for MCP, expanded agent instruction file support (AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md), auto model selection now GA, and thinking panel for extended-reasoning models.

community_feedback.quote: GitHub Copilot chat communication via markdown files for clear permanent records
New agentic improvements, UX refinements, and quality updates based on community feedback

title: New Plugins on the Cursor Marketplace
description: Added more than 30 new plugins from major partners including Atlassian, Datadog, GitLab, Glean, Hugging Face, monday.com, and PlanetScale. Cursor can now read from, write to, and take actions across more of your stack.

title: Progressive Web App (PWA) Release
description: Devin can now be installed as a Progressive Web App on both desktop and mobile devices through Chrome or Edge browsers via app.devin.ai, making the AI agent more accessible across platforms.

title: Cascade and MCP Improvements (v1.9577.24)
description: Fixed dangling Diff Zones related to Jupyter Notebooks, improved Jupyter Notebook performance on WSL, enhanced Cascade UI rendering performance, added support for loading SKILL.md files, and improved context management for MCP servers. Also added system-level Skill definitions via MDM-managed configs for Enterprise.

community_feedback.quote: Windsurf performed better with medium-to-large codebases according to Reddit's ChatGPTCoding community

title: Generalist Agent and Model Steering (v0.32.0)
description: Generalist Agent enabled to improve task delegation and routing. Model Steering in Workspace added, Plan Mode expanded with built-in research subagents and annotation support. Also includes new shortcuts, run-event notifications on macOS, and various bug fixes.

title: Codex CLI 0.107.0 Release
description: Improved approval prompts and app connection sign-in flows, along with additional performance improvements and bug fixes.
